intro.caption: Design and technology turning ideas into high-impact digital experiences.
typeLines: Design and technology that make an impact.

personal: Key information for work and collaboration
services: From the first idea to a market-ready result

about: I am Sarhang Salah, a creative and detail-oriented professional working across motion graphics, graphic design, branding, UI/UX, website development, video editing, digital content production, and social-media management.

I can build a complete brand identity, from the first logo and color system through packaging, social-media assets, video advertising, motion graphics, catalogues, brochures, websites, and digital-marketing campaigns. My goal is to create a distinctive, modern, and effective identity that builds customer trust and strengthens audience engagement.
personal: Iraq — available for remote work and project collaboration

services.title: Motion Graphics & Video
services.summary: Animated content and commercial video for brands and social media.
bullets: Motion graphics for advertising, brands, and sales campaigns
Logo animation, intro/outro, and motion typography
Promotional video, commercial ads, Reels, Shorts, and short-form content
Video editing, montage, color correction/grading, and VFX / GFX / SFX / CGI
YouTube thumbnails and video-cover design

services.title: Graphic Design & Branding
services.summary: From brand concept to a complete and consistent visual system.
bullets: Logo, brand identity, color guidance, and typography
Business cards, office materials, receipts, and commercial identity assets
Flex, banners, posters, printed advertising, and digital advertising
Brochures, catalogues, books, booklets, packaging, and label design
Product mockups, social-media posts, and promotional campaign layouts

services.title: Social Media & Digital Marketing
services.summary: Content planning, production, and management focused on brand growth.
bullets: Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube management
Content strategy, content calendars, post, and story preparation
Advertising campaigns, ads management, and sponsored-content setup
Brand awareness, audience engagement, and campaign coordination
Performance analysis and recommendations to strengthen campaigns

services.title: Web Design & UI/UX
services.summary: Fast, responsive, and modern websites with clear user experiences.
bullets: Landing pages, portfolio websites, and commercial websites
UI/UX design and user-flow planning
Responsive web design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
WordPress and HTML / CSS / JavaScript / React / Python workflows
Domains, hosting, deployment, Cloudflare, Supabase, and Firebase

experience.title: K Door Company
experience.desc: Created motion graphics, commercial advertising design, camera work, and social-media content management and production, along with promotional video and modern sales content tailored to the company. K Door is one of Iraq’s major manufacturers of doors and residential products. I worked with the company full-time for approximately one and a half years.

experience.title: Dar Najran
experience.desc: Delivered graphic design, digital and sponsored advertising, sales-product design, flex materials, visual identity, and content production for stationery and school-supplies products. I work with the brand as a designer and sponsored-campaign manager, and have delivered multiple projects for it.

experience.title: Honey Behesht
experience.desc: Built branding, packaging and label design, social-media content, product presentation, and motion advertising for a natural honey and food brand.

experience.title: Jwankila
experience.desc: Created commercial advertising, social-media posts, visual branding, product promotion, labels, campaigns, and story content for a cosmetics and beauty brand. Jwankila is one of the larger pages selling women’s products and goods.

experience.title: CDC Peshang / Peshang Institute
experience.desc: Developed educational advertising, managed social media, and ran sponsored campaigns.

experience.title: Betapik
experience.desc: Handled graphic design, page management, agency work, digital-content production, advertising, promotion, sales posts, and modern product presentation.

experience.title: Mashtal
experience.desc: Managed the page and sponsored campaigns, created posts and sales advertising, and planned content.

achievement.title: Game Pixel — 2018 to 2021
achievement.text: From 2018 to 2021, I worked as a gaming-content creator, producing videos and tutorials, designing thumbnails, editing video, and managing the channel community. This experience gave me practical insight into audience-focused content, brand organization, and community growth.
achievement.legacyNote: The first channel reached 80K+ subscribers before it was closed because of a copyright issue.
achievement.channelAria: Open the current Game Pixel YouTube channel

facebookGroup.title: Facebook group · 60K+ members
facebookGroup.text: A dedicated Facebook community for Islamic religious posts and content.

projects.title: Motion, Video & Commercial Production
projects.desc: Motion graphics, promotional video, commercial ads, Reels, Shorts, logo animation, intro/outro, VFX, and editing.

projects.title: Graphic Design & Brand Identity
projects.desc: Logos, brand identity, packaging, labels, mockups, business cards, brochures, catalogues, books, booklets, flex, and banners.

projects.title: Social Media & Campaigns
projects.desc: Social-media posts, Instagram Stories, Facebook Ads, TikTok content, content strategy, promotional campaigns, and audience engagement.

projects.title: Websites, Landing Pages & UI/UX
projects.desc: Websites, landing pages, portfolios, UI/UX, WordPress, HTML / CSS / JavaScript, responsive design, hosting, and deployment.

projects.title: 3D & AI Visual Production
projects.desc: 3D product scenes, 3D text animation, product mockups, AI-generated images and videos, AI photography, and creative prompt workflows.

brandsText: A selection of the brands, agencies, and organizations I have supported through design, content, campaigns, or digital production.
strengths: Able to work effectively under pressure and within short deadlines.
Comfortable working independently and as part of a team.
Fast learner who adapts quickly to new technologies.
Professional communication and client relationship skills.
Able to turn a simple idea into an effective visual scene.
Presents projects in a formal, modern and organized manner.

entries: Continuous learning in technology, design, programming, editing, and artificial intelligence through real project delivery for brands and companies.

contact.title: Ready to turn your idea into a high-impact result.
contact.text: For private projects, branding, websites, advertising campaigns, social media, motion graphics, or any digital project that needs creative thinking and close attention to detail, please get in touch.

portfolio.intro: Selected work is presented as a clear work index. Client and brand names are shown; however, unpublished campaign visuals, source files, and confidential commercial material are not published.
portfolio.noteText: Additional visual samples are available on request. I can also create a professional, customized CV or portfolio in a style similar to this one. For a request or more information, please get in touch.

items.title: K Door Company
items.summary: Creative work for a company in the doors and residential-products sector, supporting sales communication and social-media presence.

items.title: Honey Behesht
items.summary: Visual work for a natural honey and food brand, connecting product presentation with packaging, label design, and social-media communication.

items.title: Game Pixel
items.summary: Channel-growth experience focused on game-video publishing, editing, audience development, and platform-native content decisions.
